channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ramaphosa faces legal challenges over Phala Phala inquiry
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa's legal battle against an impeachment inquiry centered on his Phala Phala farm scandal has intensified. The Western Cape High Court is considering whether the presidency can ...

item.title: Jude Bellingham and Argentina's Valentin Barco Clash After World Cup Match
item.description: The article details the incident where England midfielder Jude Bellingham was captured on camera striking Argentina's Valentin Barco following their 2-1 defeat in the 2026 FIFA World Cup semi-final. T...

item.title: Ombudsman Dismisses Case Against Former DTI Official
item.description: The Office of the Ombudsman has officially withdrawn its legal case against a former Department of Trade and Industry (DTI) official, marking a significant development in ongoing investigations into a...

item.title: Federal Govt Funds Tailors Under SUPA Program to Boost Skills
item.description: The Federal Government has allocated N3.6 billion to support tailors through the Skill Up Artisans Programme (SUPA) under the Industrial Training Fund. This initiative aims to strengthen Nigeria's inf...

item.title: Women Cricketers from Rural India Redefining the Game
item.description: The article highlights the struggles and triumphs of women cricketers from rural India, such as Disha Singh from Morena and Archana Devi from Uttar Pradesh, who defy societal norms to pursue cricket. ...

item.title: Wildfires in Northwestern Ontario Lead to Evacuations and Air Quality Warnings
item.description: Wildfires in northwestern Ontario have forced evacuations in several First Nation communities, including Armstrong, Collins First Nation, Lac La Croix First Nation, Lac des Mille Lacs First Nation, an...

item.title: CIPM Conducts First Virtual Induction for 78 HR Professionals, Emphasizes Innovation and Professional Excellence
item.description: The Chartered Institute of Personnel Management of Nigeria (CIPM) recently held its first-ever virtual induction ceremony, welcoming 78 new HR professionals into the profession. This landmark 71st Ind...

item.title: TMC Rebel Group Gains Support as Allegations Against Abhishek Banerjee Emerge
item.description: Kamarhati legislator Madan Mitra, a long-time aide of Mamata Banerjee, has joined the rebel faction within the Trinamool Congress (TMC), led by Ritabrata Banerjee. This move has strengthened the rebel...

item.title: Chadema Regional Leader Faces Assault Amid Political Tensions in Geita

item.title: Senate Impeachment Court Faces Debate Over Evidence Access in Sara Duterte Case
item.description: The Senate impeachment court is grappling with a contentious issue regarding the access to Vice President Sara Duterte's financial records. Private prosecutor Lorna Kapunan accused Duterte of obstruct...

item.title: Ramaphosa's Legal Team Opposes Impeachment Hearings, Citing Reputational Risks
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa's legal team has argued against proceeding with impeachment hearings, warning of 'irreparable' damage to his reputation if the process continues. Adv Wim Trengrove contended ...

item.title: England fans reflect on spirited yet disappointing semi-final defeat to Argentina
item.description: The article captures the emotional response of England cricket supporters following their semi-final loss to Argentina in a high-stakes match. Fans expressed pride in their team's resilience and spiri...

item.title: U.S. Hosts Global Meeting to Address Far-Left Terrorism Threat
item.description: The United States is hosting an international ministerial meeting aimed at coordinating efforts to combat far-left terrorism, which the Trump administration describes as a growing transnational threat...

item.title: Teen accused of possessing extremist materials granted bail under strict conditions
item.description: A 18-year-old teenager has been released on bail following accusations of possessing bomb-making manuals and extremist material linked to Islamic State. The youth, arrested in March after authorities ...

item.title: Pritty Vishy Announces She Is Beginning a Career as a DJ
item.description: Kenyan influencer Pritty Vishy has announced that she is venturing into DJing, adding another role to her growing career as a content creator and influencer. She shared the news through a video posted...

item.title: Simulation reveals the International Space Station's incredible speed at ground level
item.description: A simulation demonstrating the International Space Station (ISS) traveling at ground level has captivated viewers, highlighting its astonishing speed. The visualization shows the ISS orbiting Earth at...

item.title: Navigating Financial Stress at Family Dinners: A Guide for Parents
item.description: The article explores the growing tension among families during dinner gatherings, where older generations face criticism from their children about financial hardships. A family shares their experience...

item.title: Summer Sales Guide: Top Deals on Fashion, Electronics, and Home Goods
